title: orthochilus thomsonii
intro: Orthochilus thomsonii, also known as the Thomson's orchid or the Himalayan orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Orthochilus thomsonii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable plant in the treatment of various health conditions. The herbal preparations of Orthochilus thomsonii include infusions, decoctions, and extracts that are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
